{{Infobox concept
| name = Sage
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Sage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sages]] represent a peak stage of advancement for [[sacred artists]], positioned above Archlords. They are characterized by their connection to an [[Icon]], which is a symbolic representation of a greater concept of reality. To reach this level, an individual must undergo intense willpower training and align themselves conceptually with their chosen [[Icon]]. Unlike [[Heralds]], who focus their power inwardly to enhance themselves, [[Sages]] focus their willpower externally to directly influence and change the world through their unique authority. While [[Sages]] possess immense power, they are not invincible; they can be vulnerable to physical strikes and are considered less durable than [[Heralds]]. It is a common belief that [[Sages]] rarely take true disciples because they do not wish to pass on their specific [[Paths]], and training at such a level is considered an incredibly difficult and lonely pursuit. Many [[Sages]] are perceived as being ancient in spirit, even if they appear young. Notable figures include the [[Sword Sage]] (also known as [[Adama]] or the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]]), the [[Sage of Red Faith]], the [[Sage of a Thousand Eyes]], the [[Winter Sage]], and the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]]. Other identified [[Sages]] include the [[Void Sage]], the [[Mist Sage]], the [[Silent Sage]], the [[Storm Sage]], and the Sage of the [[Frozen Blade]].}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sage]] is a rank or status.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is a disciple of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There are only three [[Sages]] on the entire continent.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage]] was watching [[Kiro]] through her owl.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage]] is expected to intervene.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage]] chose the team leader.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage]] sent a letter to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage]] intends to retrieve [[Eithan]] and others in approximately eight months.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] refers to the [[Sage]] regarding the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] had [[Sage]]'s protection in the past.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|In the [[Sacred Valley]], the title of Sage is shrouded in vague legends and remains a secret to anyone below the rank of [[Archlord]]. To achieve this status, an individual must contact an [[Icon]], which allows them to command reality directly through a specific scope of power known as authority. While the concept of a Sage was historically more fluid, modern [[Sages]] possess the capability to ferry people across vast distances. Following the [[Uncrowned]] competition, a month of specialized training is required, though even powerful figures like [[Dross]] struggle to comprehend the true nature of these abilities. For some, such as [[Eithan]], ascending to Sage represents a fundamentally different challenge than reaching the level of [[Archlord]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Sage]] is a title that people in [[Sacred Valley]] have vague stories about.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The nature of [[Sages]] is a secret for anyone below [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After the [[Uncrowned]] competition, there is a month of [[Sage]] training.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] cannot yet comprehend the nature of [[Sage]] powers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sages]] are capable of ferrying people across great distances.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage]]'s personal home is a complex of huts at the foot of a mountain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|To become a [[Sage]], one must contact an [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sages]] and [[Monarchs]] can command reality directly through their authority.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Authority]] is the scope of a [[Sage]] or [[Monarch]]'s power related to their [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] asks the [[Blood Shadow]] if it is trying to beat her to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Reaching [[Sage]] was a different matter for [[Eithan]] than reaching [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The concept of a [[Sage]] was historically more fluid than it is today.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is identified as the youngest individual to hold the title of Sage. During her time in these lands, [[Lindon]] possesses senses attuned to her status. Both [[Charity]] and [[Malice]] utilize their specific Sage powers through the application of their techniques. Furthermore, the Sage provides a tool to the realm that functions as a key for a prison located within the [[labyrinth]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] is associated with the youngest [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Sage]] is a title used for [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has [[Sage senses]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]] and [[Malice]] worked their [[Sage]] powers through their techniques.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sage]] brought a tool to the lands that serves as a key to a prison in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Sage represents a specific state or destination that an individual can reach. Within the [[Sect of Twin Stars]], the founder holds this rank, and it is a status eventually attained by [[Lindon]]. Those at this level possess the power to deploy techniques that obscure spiritual perception, and they are among the few capable of surviving or altering the workings of the [[labyrinth]]. Furthermore, [[Sages]] are required to swear an oath when they make progress in their advancement or approach the truth. Even [[Subject One]] recognized [[Lindon]]'s potential by addressing him as a young Sage.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The sect founder of the [[Sect of Twin Stars]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] holds the status of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|No one below [[Sage]] or [[Herald]] is believed to have the ability to survive and alter the [[labyrinth]]'s workings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The owner of the white badge was a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sages]] can send out techniques that blot out spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] addressed [[Lindon]] as a young [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sages]] and [[Heralds]] are made to swear an oath when they come close to the truth or make progress in advancement.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sage]] is a destination or state one can reach.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The storm artist may have been on the verge of advancing to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ziel]] is not a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] has the protection of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Sage]] walked into [[Malice]]'s strongholds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After [[Lindon]] instructed [[Kahn Mala]] to use the name Sage, it was revealed that this rank represents a potential path for [[Mercy]]. While [[Sages]] possess authority embedded within their techniques similar to [[Monarchs]], their bodies lack the ability to conduct willpower in the same manner as a [[Herald]]. During an exploration of the [[labyrinth]], a Sage called out [[Lindon]]'s name, and it was noted that [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] functioned as a new Sage and [[Herald]] pairing. While the energy within a specific page might provide guidance toward achieving this rank, a blonde Sage with gray streaks in her hair eventually entered the [[vault]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] told [[Kahn Mala]] to call him [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage]] is a potential path or rank for [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sages]] and [[Monarchs]] have authority bound up in their techniques.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Sage]] called [[Lindon]]'s name from within the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sage]] bodies cannot conduct willpower like a [[Herald]]'s can.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] were a new [[Sage]] and [[Herald]] respectively.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The energy in the page might guide one to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A blonde [[Sage]] with streaks of gray in her hair entered the [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The workings of a [[Sage]] would not disrupt the world too much.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Six fights left,” Mercy said. “Six days. After that, the Uncrowned will be taken away for a month of Sage training.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You seeing if you can beat me to Sage?” Yerin asked.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Last chance? You think they’ll haul you back from spending time with the youngest Sage and some kind of tiny Herald?<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“The Sage brought this to our lands,” Elder Whisper continued, “a tool granted to him by a Monarch. A key to the prison at the depths of the labyrinth.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“I can’t see anyone below Sage or Herald having the ability to both survive and alter its workings,” Eithan said.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
